questionHtml: Some nitride ions are 15N3–. State the term that describes the relationship between 14N3– and 15N3–.

meta.title: Some nitride ions are 15N3–. State the term that describes the relationship between 14N3– and 15N3–.
breadcrumbLabels: Structure 1. Models of the particulate nature of matter

Structure 1.2.2—Isotopes. Isotopes are atoms of the same element with different numbers of neutrons. Perform calculations involving non-integer relative atomic masses and abundance of isotopes from given data.
